raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 66 tasks the Scripps Institution of Oceanography with conducting a research study to improve coastal monitoring capabilities.",
    "The research study aims to develop a coastal bluff collapse early warning system to improve beach safety and prevent fatalities.",
    "Bluff collapses are a constant threat to coastal neighborhoods in Northern San Diego County and across the California coast.",
    "The U.S. Geological Survey estimates that up to 1,000,000 residents and $320 billion in property throughout California are at risk due to erosion and flooding.",
    "The research will focus on understanding how deformations of coastal bluffs are impacted by tides, large surf, groundwater, and rainfall.",
    "The goal of the research is to determine whether signals exist that can forecast the risk of bluff collapse."
  ]
}
```
